case_title: EDUCAP, INC. VS. PATRICIA J PERVIS MILLER et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDUCAP, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, PATRICIA J PERVIS MILLER, ROD A $12,611.70 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $4,788.64 INTEREST, $466.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,666.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
